name: gbrain
description: Garry's Opinionated OpenClaw/Hermes Agent Brain. Your AI agent is smart but forgetful. GBrain gives it a brain.
key_features: Self-wiring knowledge graph with typed links
PGLite default (2-second setup), Postgres+pgvector for scale
Benchmarked P@5 49.1%, R@5 97.9% on Opus corpus

repo_structure.skills: Fat markdown skills for agent workflows
